_meta.notes: Vessel target at 1800m in the approach band (100m–5km). Distance + closing rate derive from vessel.target's Vec3 fields; negative radial rate = closing gap — closing rate renders in green/accent tone. TCA (o.closestTgtApprUT minus SDK view-UT) needs a TelemetryProvider for view-UT, so under the bare snapshot harness it degrades to '—'; the stream test covers the live TCA readout.
